products.name: Classic Chocolate Chip
products.description: Our signature buttery cookie loaded with premium dark chocolate chips. Crispy edges, gooey center — perfection in every bite.

products.name: Brown Butter Hazelnut
products.description: Nutty brown butter cookie studded with toasted hazelnuts and a sprinkle of sea salt. A sophisticated twist on a classic.

products.name: Snickerdoodle Swirl
products.description: Soft, pillowy cookies rolled in cinnamon sugar with a caramelized, crinkled top. Warm and cozy in every bite.

products.name: Triple Layer Rose Cake
products.description: Three layers of fluffy vanilla sponge with rosy buttercream and fresh raspberry compote. Stunning for any celebration.

products.name: Dark Chocolate Truffle
products.description: Deeply rich cocoa cake with silky ganache frosting and handcrafted chocolate truffles on top.

products.name: Custom Birthday Cake
products.description: Personalized to your vision — choose your flavors, colors, and design. Every detail crafted with love just for you.

products.name: Dark Fudge Brownie
products.description: Intensely chocolatey with a crinkled top and fudgy center. Made with 70% dark cocoa for the ultimate brownie experience.

products.name: Walnut Crunch Brownie
products.description: Classic fudge brownie loaded with toasted walnut pieces for the perfect crunch in every bite.

products.name: Cookie Assortment Box
products.description: A curated selection of our bestselling cookies in a beautiful gift box. Perfect for gifting someone special or treating yourself.

products.name: Deluxe Celebration Box
products.description: Our premium box featuring 6 cookies, 4 brownies, and 2 mini cakes — wrapped in our signature cream and rose packaging.

products.name: Seasonal Holiday Box
products.description: Limited edition seasonal treats with festive decorations and flavors inspired by the time of year. Ask us what's available!

products.name: Strawberry Dream Cake
products.description: Light chiffon cake layered with fresh strawberry cream and real strawberry slices. A summer favourite, available year-round.
